problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Quantum tunneling through energy barrier may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
